name: Oh So Good Pie
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Firmly packed light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to moderate (350°F).
2. Prepare pie crust mix following package directions for a 9-inch pastry shell with fluted edge.
3. Toss together raisins, pecans, and flour in a medium size bowl until raisins and pecans are well coated with flour.
4. Beat together butter and brown sugar in a large bowl until well blended.
5. Add egg yolks, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Add whiskey, vinegar, cinnamon, nutmeg, and allspice; blend well.
7. Stir in raisin nut mixture.
8. Beat egg whites and salt in a medium size bowl with an electric mixer at high speed until soft peaks form.
9. Fold whites into raisin nut mixture.
10. Pour into pastry shell.
11. Bake in oven for 35 minutes or until slightly puffed and set. Serve warm or at room temperature with Spiked Whipped Cream.
Spiked Whipped Cream:
1. Beat together one cup heavy cream, 2 tbsp sugar, and 2 tsp whiskey in a medium size bowl until soft peaks form.
